event: Profile refresh campaign began, raising steady image upload volume
Image processing latency alert fired as queue depth began rising gradually
Initial hypothesis focused on higher upload volume or object storage latency, since the queue was growing without immediate hard failures
Metrics review showed normal S3 latency but monotonic worker memory growth and increasing container restarts
Recent image parser commit was identified as a likely source of retained heap growth under larger EXIF payloads
Queue depth and restart rates began recovering after rollback
